quote: He that breaks a thing to find out what it is has left the path of wisdom.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: Many that live deserve death. And some that die deserve life. Can you give it to them? Then do not be too eager to deal out death in judgement.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: The world is indeed full of peril, and in it there are many dark places; but still there is much that is fair, and though in all lands love is now mingled with grief, it grows perhaps the greater.
speaker: Haldir

quote: Faithless is he that says farewell when the road darkens.
speaker: Gimli

quote: Even as fog under the morning sun the shadows of old sorrows pass from us.
speaker: Glorfindel

quote: Despair is only for those who see the end beyond all doubt. We do not.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: The burned hand teaches best. After that, advice about fire goes to the heart.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: I do not love the bright sword for its sharpness, nor the arrow for its swiftness, nor the warrior for his glory. I love only that which they defend.
speaker: Faramir

quote: War must be, while we defend our lives against a destroyer who would devour all; but I do not love the bright sword for its sharpness, nor the arrow for its swiftness, nor the warrior for his glory.
speaker: Faramir

quote: The hasty stroke goes oft astray.
speaker: Aragorn

quote: Oft the unbidden guest proves the best company.
speaker: Éomer

quote: Where will wants not, a way opens, so we say.
speaker: Éowyn

quote: There is some good in this world, and it's worth fighting for.
speaker: Samwise Gamgee

quote: How do you pick up the threads of an old life? How do you go on, when in your heart you begin to understand... there is no going back?
speaker: Frodo Baggins

quote: I will not say: do not weep; for not all tears are an evil.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: End? No, the journey doesn't end here. Death is just another path, one that we all must take.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: A man that flies from his fear may find that he has only taken a short cut to meet it.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: For nothing is evil in the beginning. Even Sauron was not so.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: The treacherous are ever distrustful.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: It is not our part to master all the tides of the world, but to do what is in us for the succour of those years wherein we are set.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: A mortal, Frodo, who keeps one of the Great Rings, does not die, but he does not grow or obtain more life, he merely continues, until at last every minute is a weariness.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: What do you fear, lady? A cage. To stay behind bars, until use and old age accept them, and all chance of doing great deeds is gone beyond recall or desire.
speaker: Éowyn

quote: I am old, Gandalf. I don't look it, but I am beginning to feel it in my heart of hearts. Well-preserved indeed! Why, I feel all thin, sort of stretched, if you know what I mean: like butter that has been scraped over too much bread.
speaker: Bilbo Baggins

quote: Reason has fled from Denethor. He sees in the stone only the Black Hand, and in the stone only what the Enemy wills to show.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: The Dark Lord has Nine. But we have One, mightier than they: the White Rider. He has passed through the fire and the abyss, and they shall fear him.
speaker: Legolas

quote: Yet such is oft the course of deeds that move the wheels of the world: small hands do them because they must, while the eyes of the great are elsewhere.
speaker: Elrond

quote: Memory is not what the heart desires. That is only a mirror.
speaker: Gimli

quote: There are other forces at work in this world, Frodo, besides the will of evil.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: Even in darkness a hand may be stretched out to give aid to another.
speaker: Samwise Gamgee

quote: The praise of the praiseworthy is above all rewards.
speaker: Faramir

quote: In Mordor one does not grow fat, nor do swords keep their edge long.
speaker: Faramir

quote: I am no man.
speaker: Éowyn

quote: There lies the fastness of Southern Mirkwood. It is clad in a forest of dark fir, where the trees strive one against another and their branches rot and wither.
speaker: Gandalf

quote: Speak no evil of the night! The stars are fair; and the Moon shines above the Ered Luin.
speaker: Glorfindel

quote: There is no real going back. Though I may come to the Shire, it will not seem the same; for I shall not be the same.
speaker: Frodo Baggins

quote: It is a strange fate that we should suffer so much fear and doubt over so small a thing. Such a little thing.
speaker: Boromir

quote: Deeds will not be less valiant because they are unpraised.
speaker: Aragorn

quote: The Lord of Gondor is not to be made the tool of other men's purposes, however worthy. And to him there is no purpose higher in the world as it now stands than the good of Gondor.
speaker: Denethor

quote: I have no help to send, therefore I must go myself.
speaker: Aragorn
